title: distephanus ochroleucus
intro: Distephanus ochroleucus is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a daisy bush. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Distephanus ochroleucus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
